arts.sum: Deportivo Alaves sit just one point above the relegation zone, while Real Betis are in 10th. Alaves have failed to win since November 1st, and only Real Valladolid have conceded more goals than them....

arts.ttl: Gavi labels Barcelona teammate ‘the best player in the world’ after win over Real Betis
arts.sum: Barcelona star Gavi has this week moved to lavish the ultimate praise on teammate Lamine Yamal. This comes fresh off another dazzling performance on the part of the latter, on…
